description_long: This is a Kalashnikov-style assault rifle, characterized by its iconic curved magazine and robust, utilitarian design. The rifle features a fixed wooden stock and handguard, both with a reddish-brown finish, contrasting with the matte black metal receiver, barrel, and other components. The barrel is long and slender, ending in a simple front sight post and a slotted flash hider. The receiver includes a prominent charging handle and selector switch, while the trigger guard and pistol grip are ergonomically shaped for handling. Iron sights are mounted along the top, with the rear sight positioned just forward of the stock. The overall construction suggests durability and reliability, typical of rifles designed for rugged urban or military environments.
description: A Kalashnikov-style assault rifle with a fixed wooden stock, curved magazine, and matte black metal components. Features iron sights, a slotted flash hider, and a robust, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the wooden stock, curved magazine, and barrel with front sight and flash hider.
description_view_1: Top-down view, highlighting the narrow width, iron sights alignment, and the slim profile of the barrel and receiver.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the first but with the ejection port and selector switch more visible.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view, emphasizing the magazine curvature, trigger guard, and the underside of the handguard and barrel.
